title: Spatial-Temporal Aware Visuomotor Diffusion Policy Learning
title_zh: 时空感知的视觉运动扩散策略学习
abstract: Visual imitation learning is effective for robots to learn versatile tasks. However, many existing methods rely on behavior cloning with supervised historical trajectories, limiting their 3D spatial and 4D spatiotemporal awareness. Consequently, these methods struggle to capture the $3 D$ structures and 4D spatiotemporal relationships necessary for real-world deployment. In this work, we propose 4D Diffusion Policy (DP4), a novel visual imitation learning method that incorporates spatiotemporal awareness into diffusion-based policies. Unlike traditional approaches that rely on trajectory cloning, DP4 leverages a dynamic Gaussian world model to guide the learning of 3D spatial and $4 D$ spatiotemporal perceptions from interactive environments. Our method constructs the current 3D scene from a single-view RGB-D observation and predicts the future 3D scene, optimizing trajectory generation by explicitly modeling both spatial and temporal dependencies. Extensive experiments across 17 simulation tasks with 173 variants and 3 real-world robotic tasks demonstrate that the 4D Diffusion Policy (DP4) outperforms baseline methods, improving the average simulation task success rate by 16.4% (Adroit), 14% (DexArt), and 6.45% (RLBench), and the average realworld robotic task success rate by 8.6%.
abstract_zh: 视觉模仿学习对于机器人学习多种任务非常有效。然而，许多现有方法依赖于基于监督历史轨迹的行为克隆，限制了其3D空间和4D时空感知能力。因此，这些方法难以捕捉实际部署所需的3D结构和4D时空关系。在这项工作中，我们提出了4D扩散策略（DP4），一种新颖的视觉模仿学习方法，将时空感知融入基于扩散的策略中。与依赖轨迹克隆的传统方法不同，DP4利用动态高斯世界模型来指导从交互环境中学习3D空间和4D时空感知。我们的方法从单视图RGB-D观测构建当前3D场景，并预测未来3D场景，通过显式建模空间和时间依赖关系来优化轨迹生成。在17个模拟任务（173个变体）和3个真实世界机器人任务上的大量实验表明，4D扩散策略（DP4）优于基线方法，平均模拟任务成功率在Adroit上提高16.4%，在DexArt上提高14%，在RLBench上提高6.45%，平均真实世界机器人任务成功率提高8.6%。
tldr_zh: 提出4D扩散策略，通过动态高斯世界模型增强时空感知，提升机器人模仿学习成功率。
cover_zh: 机器人学动作只会抄轨迹？这个新策略用4D时空感知直接开挂
